block_00: Stock and crypto news of the week inside
block_03: Analysts are showing renewed interest in Boeing stocks, with some predicting a bull market in the near future. You may have seen the company's stock jump on Wednesday following the news of Boeing's New ecoDemonstrator Program. Let's see if analysts' forecasts come true.
block_07: Shares rose amid Wall Street optimism and the summer peak of the grilling season – plus 6% in a week. Good job Beyond Meat, we hope this trend will continue until the end of the summer.
block_10: Analysts noticed high implied volatility on Thursday – it means there is an event coming up soon that may cause a big rally or a huge sell-off. The share price has fallen by 22% this week.
